stemHtml:
Given the following information, calculate the net glide distance for a single-engined aeroplane operating under performance class B.

Aeroplane altitude: 10 000 ft
Terrain elevation: 500 ft
Gross glide gradient: 10%
TAS: 200 kt
Headwind component: 50 kt
1 NM = 6080 ft
Still air distance = (height difference / net gradient) x 100
Ground distance = Still Air Distance x (GS / TAS)
